lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (unused import) — known acceptable per LEARNINGS.md. No new warnings.

build.output: /w/[workspaceId]/prioritization appears as dynamic server-rendered route in build output

notes: All acceptance criteria met. Step panel: SCORE_OPTIONS (1-5, labels Very Low-Very High), Effort (orange #F97316) and Impact (teal var(--brand)) button selectors added below maturity section — same flex-1 h-8 button pattern as MATURITY_OPTIONS, click toggles (click again clears). Touchpoint panel: same selectors after gain_score using pain/gain button style. Prioritization page: server component fetches steps+touchpoints+sections+stages+tabs, client PrioritizationView. Chart: CSS absolute positioning, quadrant tints (subtle green/orange/blue/red), divider lines at 50%, quadrant labels, Radix Tooltip on dots (name, group, scores), click navigates to correct canvas tab. Dot position: left=((effort-1)/4)*100%, top=((5-impact)/4)*100%. Deterministic color: sum char codes mod 8, 8-color HSL palette. Filters: Tab select (default All) + Section/Stage select (filtered by selected tab, resets on tab change). Sidebar: Target icon, Prioritization nav item added between Perspectives and Comments. Workspace-shell: 'prioritization' added to exclusion array.
